description: Configure a 'Soft Trigger' in Nx Witness VMS to control a gate using the API details found in the technical manual at '/home/ga/Documents/gate_controller_manual.txt'. Create a new Event Rule named 'OPEN GATE' with a Door/Gate icon, available only on the 'Entrance Camera'. The rule must perform a 'Do HTTP request' using the POST method, URL, and Basic Auth credentials specified in the manual.
